description: Bring back the joy of walking with these newfeel shoes. These shoes come with cool urban styling and a comfortable structure. Wear it for everyday walks or as a daily wear for your day-to-day chores around your block.UpperSoft upper made of mesh for enhanced ventilation for the feetSynthetic leather overlays for added support to the upperReinforced overlay at backfoot and around toe box for enhanced foot support and durabilityLightly padded collar and tongue for added comfort and snug FitLace-ups for snug fit and to lock the foot in placeSynthetic twill laces for durabilityStitch detailing for enhanced durability and subtle stylingMidsoleEVA midsole for soft cushioning and shock absorption, protecting the feet from impactRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleFlex grooves in multi-directional pattern for natural movement of the foot with utmost grip and stabilityEssenSole insole with polyurethane insert to provide midfoot stability for maximum support on all terrainsWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
